about:
Homage is Southeast Asia and Oceania's leading technology-driven caregiving and health services platform focused on bringing wellness and recovery through personal care delivery to care recipients families and primary caregivers where we're now delivering more than a million sessions of care annually. 

Homage's core product platform includes a holistic range of non-medical and medical solutions including disability assessments and care planning personal care assistance with daily activities skilled nursing procedures and rehabilitation services like physio- speech and occupational Therapy. Additionally Homage Health provides medical add-ons like health screening mobile medicine telemedicine ambulance and medication delivery. 

Beyond direct provision of care Homage also partners with local healthcare and community organisations to enable them to have wider reach and scalability through Homage's holistic technology and care services solution. At the heart of Homage are people where we empower our care professionals to skill up grow meaningful income and get the protection and support they need to provide the type of care we can trust our own loved ones with. 

As we define the category of and professionalise caregiving we play a key role in solving for the acute care worker shortage as well as increasing accessibility to much needed support to those living with chronic illness -- what the World Economic Forum and World Health Organisation calls one of the most pressing and fastest growing global social and economic problems to solve in the next decade. 

We are constantly on the lookout for potential Homagers (Careers @homage.co) and partners (homage.co/partners) that share our vision of driving the Homage mission forward via a highly impactful and important vocation and long-term commitment.
current_position_description:
At Homage we want to make things count. We now deliver care around the clock where what we do not only has direct impact to those we work and partner with - be it our care recipients our care providers or their loved ones it also helps solves macro issues caused by rising long term care costs and the fast rising care needs of an ageing population. 

Each member of the Homage team is a key force behind our cause and we're looking for like-minded individuals to join the Homage team that can execute our mission with resilience laser-focus and heart (Roles @homage.co) and partners (homage.co/partners) that share our vision of driving sustainable impact. 

I'm incredibly blessed with a strong team that has stayed true to our goals and we are looking to continuously build and expand teams with intense commitment to scaling our localised solutions and an ever expanding growth mindset.
current_position_2_description: As a startup advisor and investor I believe in the Antler model and cause to empower entrepreneurs in both developing economies including Africa Cambodia and the Philippines as well as more developed markets like Singapore with pre-seed funding programs. I love that Antler puts together thoughtful operating models to lay the groundwork of and invest in nascent startup communities as well as provide founder support through mentorship and coaching.
company_description:
Homage is a leading technology-driven care and health services platform that combines curated and trained care professionals with smart technology to manage and provide on-demand holistic non-medical and medical services to seniors and adults allowing them to age and recover at home with grace control and dignity. 

Homage's core care services include Disability and Care Assessments Activities of Daily Living (ADL) assistance Nursing Procedures and Rehabilitation services including Physiotherapy Speech Therapy and Occupational Therapy. Additionally Homage Health provides health screening mobile medicine telemedicine ambulance and medication delivery services. 

Operating in Singapore Malaysia and Australia Homage works with care recipients with a range of mobility and medical conditions including chronic and terminal illnesses such as Dementia Stroke Parkinson's and cancer helping them be more mobile and functional as well as providing social and personal care. Homage actively collaborates with government health and financial organisations to distribute and deliver home- and community- caregiving services.

company_description:
The world is short 4.3 million doctors. Training more won't close the gap fast enough.
Certuma builds autonomous clinical infrastructure — the technology layer that lets AI handle low-complexity medical decisions safely at scale with a licensed physician verifying every plan before it reaches a patient.
Our approach is different by design. Hybrid Deterministic Architecture combines LLM clinical reasoning with a hard validation layer that runs before any plan is drafted. Red flags contraindications scope limits uncertainty thresholds — if something doesn't pass it doesn't move forward. No exceptions.
Every plan is reviewed and signed by a licensed physician. Not as a rubber stamp — as a clinical gate. They see structured intake highlighted risks a draft with supporting evidence and full edit capability. Every modification is logged with a reason code.
Today: fast.doctor autonomous triage and care for low-complexity cases.
Next: clinical infrastructure inside hospital networks clinics and care delivery systems — wherever patients need a decision and a doctor isn't immediately available.
Not a copilot. Infrastructure.
headline: CEO of Certuma Chairman of Inception Prelude Fertility Overture and Gameto. MVB Fund CEO of Jazzya.

Skilled in Portfolio and Investment management Financial Analysis Trading Quantitiative Modelling Risk Management.

company_description:
Ancora invest is a London based firm specialised in altrenative structured credit founded in 2021. Its core strategy has been run by its founder for c. 20 years achieving consistency capital preservation and uncorrelation to public markets. 
Ancora focuses on corporate credit taking fundamental default risk on diversified corporate portfolios over near term maturities (typically 3 years).
The portfolio construction process has remained the same for 20 years focussing on capital preservation. It has been tried and tested through credit cycles leading to extremely low default rates and consistently achieving the strategy risk assumptions. Ancora’s philosophy is to capture a structural arbitrage between the credit premium and the actual realized defaults thanks to its expertise in a niche market. The key differentiator versus traditional Private Credit or SRTs / CLOs is transparency flexibility and shorter maturity. Ancora investments have a high degree of flexibility and customisation allowing to meet investors needs.

Ancora Investment Limited is an Appointed Representative of Brooklands Fund Management Limited which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority with the registered number 757575 and registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission with the registered number 286221
headline: Chief Executive at Ancora Investment Limited

company_description:
BIT CAPITAL GmbH – BERLIN INVESTMENT TECHNOLOGIES

BIT Capital is Germany's largest investment firm specializing in actively managed technology equity funds combining asset management expertise with technological capabilities. Its investment approach follows a consistently implemented Best-of-Human × Tech model integrating long-standing investment experience with data-driven analytics proprietary software curated datasets and AI-based forecasting models. Around two-thirds of all transactions are already directly influenced by proprietary data and signal systems with a rising trend. This technology-enabled framework enhances speed consistency and scalability and aims to deliver reproducible outperformance in an increasingly data-driven market environment.

The flagship fund BIT Global Technology Leaders has ranked among Europe's most successful technology equity funds since its inception on 2 January 2019. As of 31 December 2025 it achieved an annualized return of 35% and over 42% over three years repeatedly delivering sustainable outperformance versus broad indices such as the Nasdaq 100 and relevant peer groups.

The 30-member investment and data engineering team identifies technological shifts and structural growth opportunities before they are reflected in market consensus and valuations.

The approach is built on clear principles: consistently active valuation-sensitive management with portfolio turnover of up to four times per year 100% bottom-up stock selection with low index overlap and low benchmark correlation structured governance with defined decision-making and risk processes and strong alignment with investors with founders and management committing more than 10% of AuM.

The company was founded in 2017 employs 45 professionals and currently manages more than EUR 2.2 billion AuM.

This document is for information purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
headline: Europes best performing funds

company_description:
Idoven is a European deep tech company advancing early detection and precision medicine for cardiovascular diseases. The Idoven AI platform certified as EU MDR Medical Device Class IIa delivers substantial improvements to the speed consistency scalability and accuracy of electrocardiogram (ECG) interpretation. Its powerful proprietary AI model -Willem- processes ECGs from almost any ECG device. Willem is also being used to develop new digital disease biomarkers towards patient identification risk stratification and prognosis as well as drug cardiac safety monitoring. Idoven partners with leading medical device and pharmaceutical companies on AI-driven innovations to support healthcare systems globally with a new standard of cardiovascular care powered by AI.

Through exclusive partnerships and research collaborations Idoven has developed one of the world's largest ECG databases and a deep learning system applied to cardiology. Willem AI is designed to be integrated seamlessly into existing clinical and research workflows to support clinician decision making and disease management. 

Idoven has been awarded with numerous distinctions for its AI technology in Europe and the US including the prestigious European Innovation Council (EIC) Accelerator Horizon 2020 (H2020) awards and the Healthy Longevity Catalyst Award from the US National Academy of Medicine. The company is backed by top tier investors including Insight Partners Northzone and Wayra (Telefónica) the Accel Starters programme leading business angels and EIT Health. 

Idoven is based in Madrid and was founded in 2018 following almost a decade of ground-breaking research. We are building the future of cardiovascular care and we need the best minds from around the world to help us.

Interested in joining our team? Head to our careers page and apply at www.idoven.ai/jobs

about:
I am a technology entrepreneur passionate to improve healthcare. Throughout my career I got experience in healthcare delivery as a physician and in research by completing my Ph.D. in Germany. After my time at McKinsey & Company I started my entrepreneurial career by founding Clube Urbano which got acquired by Groupon. in 2013 I moved to the U.S. where I worked at Zocdoc and in 2017 co-founded Cedar the company I am currently CEO. Cedar is a technology company on the interface between fintech and healthcare technology with the mission to enable us all to easily and affordably pursue the care we need.

My passion is innovation creation and leaving the world a better place. Everyone who has been sick (and that's literally everybody) knows about the importance of good healthcare. My personal mission: When patients are most vulnerable they should focus on getting healthy. They should not have to worry about their financial well being or deal with stressful administrative hassle. Life is a journey and I will never see my mission as accomplished. I am committed to work relentlessly to get closer to my mission and having as much positive impact as I can on society.

When not working you'll find me outdoor on running trails or skiing slopes. I am a passionate pilot and kitesurfer - both hobbies give me the opportunity to disconnect from work and get energy by learning new skills.
current_position_description: The idea for Cedar began after my wife and I encountered a remarkably bad medical experience that resulted in confusion frustration and ultimately disillusion. Turns out our experience was not an isolated example—it was the norm. The financial experience is crucial to the overall patient / consumer journey. Yet today's billing process was simply not built for today's consumers. Increasingly what constitutes a good healthcare outcome for consumers isn't based solely on the clinical experience accuracy clear explanation of billing and ease of payment are just as important. The feedback is clear: consumer-friendly solutions can make or break the healthcare experience. That's why we built Cedar and we're committed to improving the healthcare experience for all.
company_description: Cedar is the performance engine for healthcare financial experience built on AI to solve the growing complexity of patient financial engagement and deliver personalization at scale. Powered by more than a billion patient interactions Cedar's platform unifies billing payments coverage and support into a single solution that continuously learns and adapts—driving stronger results for providers and simpler more empathetic and personalized financial journeys for patients. By connecting over 200+ healthcare and financial partners Cedar reduces administrative burden improves margins and helps patients access the coverage aid and payment options they need with confidence. To date Cedar has supported more than 50 million patients nationwide and processed over $10 billion in payments. To learn more visit www.cedar.com.
headline: CEO and Co-Founder at Cedar

company_description:
Allies for Allies is a nonprofit supporting parents guardians and caregivers of neurodivergent and disabled individuals. Grounded in care community and empowerment we proudly stand alongside the Down syndrome intellectual and developmental disability (IDD) autism and rare disease communities. We often refer to the individuals at the center of our work as Remarkable Humans—because that's how we see them.

Families supporting neurodivergent and disabled loved ones are facing a growing care gap. Qualified specialized caregivers can be difficult to find expensive and often unavailable when families need support most. Allies for Allies exists to help bridge this care gap by making care more accessible empowering and human.

Care Connect an initiative of Allies for Allies is a free-to-use care platform designed to help families connect with experienced specialized caregivers who support individuals of all ages with autism IDD and rare conditions. Care Connect brings together caregivers with backgrounds in special education autism support OT PT SLP ABA nursing graduate and undergraduate programs and lived caregiving experience.

What makes us different is our collaborative approach. We work alongside Regional Centers disability organizations social workers case managers and community partners to share Care Connect as a trusted resource—supporting families who are struggling to find qualified care for their loved ones. By centering real-world experience trust and access we aim to strengthen the broader care ecosystem and meet families and caregivers where they are.

Care Connect officially launches on 12/20 in the San Francisco Bay Area and Greater Sacramento with plans to expand thoughtfully over time.

about:
Elise is the founder of Asia Startup Network together with Andrew Tan. Asia Startup Network's aim is to bring together the largest venture and tech community across SE Asia to share knowledge network and also give back. ASN launches products to assist founders and their teams to grow such as a low cost healthcare insurance with Anapi.

Elise led communications & community at Vertex Ventures SE Asia & India an early stage sector agnostic fund (AUM of $1.5B).

Elise has more than a decade of experience running accelerator programs and helping early founders to learn from experts fundraise and grow their business. ASN began firstly with Mentor For Hope in 2020 an impactful mentoring initiative initially supported by the Temasek Foundation under the OSCAR grant. The initiative founded by Elise and Janet Neo facilitated 525 mentoring hours for 300 founders adversely affected by the COVID crisis connecting them with invaluable insights from 250 investors partners and experts. 

In 2021 together with Andrew organised Makan For Hope Festival (with zero budget) a series of 30 virtual roundtables featuring VC managing partners and founders from notable startups like PropertyGuru Shopback and Carousell. The festival drew participation from 500 attendees.

Elise started her venture journey by co-leading the Singapore chapter of Startup Leadership Program a non-profit accelerator program. Their augural paid program saw 25 fellows who participating. Then she joined NUS Enterprise as an investment manager where she helped secure the initial funding for Shopback ran the first SMRT x NUS hackathon and managed portfolio companies.

After her INSEAD MBA she started the fundraising team at Entrepreneur First in Singapore to help over 40 startups (See-mode. Pencil AI. Portcast etc) in securing an avg. seed round of $1.4 M within 6 to 9 months from graduation. 

As an active connector she has made over 1000s of investors for entrepreneurs. 

She served in several leadership capacity - the President for INSEAD Entrepreneurship Club and Vice President for Chemical Engineering Students' Society at NUS.

She is an advisor to the NUS Angels Ventures SE Asia's first student run angel investment network and others. organisations. She is also an alumna of NUS Overseas College program.

about:
The startup leadership journey is both challenging and exhilarating. As founders navigate from inception to scale to exit one truth remains constant – what got you here won't get you there.

Having successfully founded scaled and exited startups twice I intimately understand the transformational challenges leaders face at each stage. Since my 2017 exit I've dedicated myself to helping technical founders and CTOs navigate these critical transitions including the profound shifts brought by emerging technologies.

While traditional mentoring and coaching approaches address horizontal skill development I guide leaders through vertical development – helping them evolve their identity thinking and leadership capacities to match their company's next growth stage.

More recently I have been helping founders and technical leaders navigate AI-driven transformation with particular attention to the deeper identity and purpose questions that determine successful adaptation.

Drawing upon a range of advanced training theory and lived experiences I help leaders:

- Expand cognitive and emotional capacities for greater complexity
- Navigate ambiguity and technological disruption with confidence
- Increase psychological maturity and self-awareness
- Evolve their professional identity to meet new challenges
- Lead authentically through transformative change
- Develop stronger interpersonal relationships across their organization
- Enhance personal resilience during periods of uncertainty

The most successful technology leaders understand that adaptation isn't just about skills—it's about evolving who you are. I help leaders guide both themselves and their teams through these crucial transitions to emerge stronger more creative and more impactful.

If you're a founder or technical leader facing changing market conditions team transition challenges or your own evolving role in the organization let's connect. Case studies and testimonials available on request.

about:
Dr. Johann "Hansi" Hansmann is one of Austria's most renowned business angels - and the only one to have received a lifetime achievement award for his contributions to the startup ecosystem. A former pharmaceutical executive turned entrepreneur Hansi successfully exited his own pharma company in Spain in 2003. Since then he has become a central figure in Europe's early-stage investment landscape. Named Best European Early Stage Investor by EBAN in 2016 he also served as President of the Austrian Angel Investors Association until 2021. Based in Vienna Hansi is just as passionate about mountain biking as he is about startups. 
His group has made over 100 direct investments and currently maintains stakes in more than 50 active companies alongside over 20 limited partner (LP) positions in venture capital funds. With a sector-agnostic Europe-focused strategy they typically invest at the pre-seed stage and take on active lead roles - supporting portfolio companies across all phases of growth. Notable exits where they led investments include Runtastic Shpock MySugr Durchblicker Busuu and Tractive. The current portfolio includes companies like Journi haelsi Storebox Anyline Helloagain Mimo Credi2 reebuild one100 and many others. 
Today the Hans(wo)men Group is evolving into a modern entrepreneurial family office with a diversified portfolio spanning venture capital real estate and both private and public equity. It also actively engages in philanthropic initiatives focused on entrepreneurship and entrepreneurial education climate change and the advancement of gender equality. If you want us on board as strong partners please send your pitch deck to pitch@hansmengroup.com. Please do not contact Hansi directly — he won't be able to respond to individual requests. 
"People rarely succeed unless they have fun in what they are doing"

company_description:
In 2013 Unsplash launched as a modest Tumblr blog. Since then Unsplash has evolved into one of the most impactful online communities. Today over 10 billion Unsplash images are seen every month. A photo featured on Unsplash will now be viewed more than the front page of The New York Times.

The Unsplash community is fueled by contributors who offer their images freely for anyone to use inspiring hundreds of millions of creators from 13-year-old graphic designers to multi-platinum recording artists.

Unsplash is a special community where the powerful principles of sharing and openness have taken the place of strict copyright and legal red tape. 

The web was meant to connect inform and inspire us in unprecedented ways. The Unsplash community embodies this philosophy fully. Unsplash has become a place where the impact of our connected world is on full display. Instead of images being hoarded and shut down images on Unsplash are fuel for creativity.

At Unsplash our mission is to enable everyone to create. You don't need to know someone or have an agent or have a name to be great on Unsplash. We're a place where creators meet their audience. A place where individuals become a community. And a source of inspiration for millions of people from every country in the world. We've seen how the willingness to give a single image unlocks the creative potential that exists in us all.

company_description:
Zelt is the UK's leading native all-in-one HR and Finance platform built to give mid-sized businesses the tools they need to manage pay and grow their people. 

Built from the ground up as a single unified system — not stitched-together point solutions you get from most vendors — Zelt was designed by the minds behind Access Personio and Deel with one goal: to create a fundamentally better experience for HR and Finance teams.

Zelt brings every aspect of the employee lifecycle into a single seamlessly connected platform. From recruitment onboarding and absence management to payroll benefits administration and expense tracking Zelt eliminates the silos that slow HR and Finance teams down. With deep integrations across IT time & attendance performance management and real-time analytics Zelt gives leaders a complete 360-degree view of their workforce. 

Trusted by leading organisations across arts entertainment food media fashion and education — including Shakespeare's Globe Wilson Solicitors Calo VCU Arts Mumsnet and Club L — Zelt has rapidly established itself as the platform of choice for ambitious mid-sized businesses. 

That reputation is backed by industry recognition: Zelt is a G2 Leader in HR software and a proud winner of the Global Payroll Association's In-Country Payroll Vendor of the Year — testament to the reliability accuracy and innovation that sits at the heart of everything we build.

Ready to see what Zelt can do for your business? Follow the link below and watch a recorded product tour online.

about:
I've spent the last 14 years investing in early-stage technology companies. Through Dust Road Ventures I back founders at the earliest stages — often as the first cheque — across fintech AI digital health and software. 

The portfolio now spans 75+ companies across the US UK Europe Israel and emerging markets. 

Some of these companies include being the co-Founder of Tide (now valued at over $1.5bn) and seed investing in Wise (now valued at around $12bn). Other seed and early-stage investments include K Health HiBob and Cleo AI (all valued at over $1bn) as well as Purplebricks Earnin YuLife Graze CityMapper Elliptic Canopy Connect Zoe Sure Cazoo VivaReal Seat Unique and Dig AI amongst others.

I focus on businesses that use breakthrough technology to rebuild and reimagine large slow industries from first principles. 

Before investing full-time I founded and built start-ups. I co-founded Tide the UK's largest SME banking platform with over 1.6 million members across four countries. Before that I founded Supply Chain Connect a cloud-based supply chain platform that was acquired in 2005. And I co-founded Wonga in 2007 and served as CEO until 2013 — an experience that taught me as much about what to build as how to build it. 

I grew up in South Africa studied at the University of Cape Town and then at Boston University. 

I split my time between London and Tel Aviv. What I look for in founders is insane ambition resilience clarity of thinking speed of execution and an obsession with the problem rather than the solution. I'm most useful in the first 24 months or so — on product positioning early hiring and fundraising strategy. I write small cheques stay close often riding shotgun with the founder in the early years and try to be genuinely helpful without taking any credit for it. If we haven't met the best way to reach me is through someone we both know and trust.
current_position_description: Founder & Managing Partner Dust Road Ventures Early-stage investor in 75+ companies globally Co-founded Tide ($1.5bn)

company_description:
Studypages helps research teams sponsors and clinical research centers manage participant enrollment referrals and study coordination without the overwhelm.

It’s built to make clinical research more efficient for everyone involved: sponsors study teams and participants.

Recruiting participants tracking referrals staying on top of follow-ups and coordinating across multiple teams or sites shouldn’t feel like a full-time job. That’s why we created a clinical operations platform that brings participant management trial recruitment and multi-site coordination into one shared space.

For organizations running a portfolio of studies whether across sites sponsors or programs Studypages offers the tools to manage volume without losing control. From one dashboard teams can track participant activity assign follow-ups and collaborate in real time.

For sponsors this means stronger site engagement better data quality and a clear view into recruitment progress.
For study teams it means fewer manual handoffs and more time focused on study delivery.
For participants it means quicker responses and fewer communication breakdowns.

No more juggling spreadsheets disconnected inboxes or duplicate entries. Studypages gives you a centralized HIPAA-compliant system for handling enrollment workflows referral management team coordination and task tracking built to match how research actually runs.

Whether you're enrolling for one trial or managing multiple across a network Studypages helps streamline operations and support better outcomes at every stage.

If you're looking to improve how your team or organization manages recruitment and coordination across studies we’d love to show you how Studypages can help.
headline: Co-Founder at Studypages

current_position_description:
I joined D2T Protection Services to help build something from the ground up and that is exactly what the role has been.
On the sales side I focus on identifying and developing growth opportunities across commercial and institutional markets structuring multi-year service agreements and working directly with ownership to ensure what we sell is something we can actually deliver. In under six months I grew regional revenue by 70% by staying disciplined on discovery qualifying the right clients and engaging at the decision-maker level.
On the operations side I hold accountability for dispatch and scheduling field personnel management compliance and payroll oversight. Beyond day-to-day execution I have built the internal infrastructure the company runs on. That includes designing the employee onboarding system from scratch authoring the company-wide conduct and device usage policy establishing standardized filing and documentation conventions and developing the org structure and reporting framework that supports our supervisors and field teams. These are the kinds of systems that do not exist until someone builds them and building them is work I take seriously.
What this role has reinforced is that scaling a service organization requires equal parts relationship building operational discipline and the ability to create structure where there is none. I have had to operate across all three often on the same day.
That range is where I do my best work.

company_description:
O Hospital 9 de Julho é uma das mais importantes instituições de saúde do País referência em medicina de alta complexidade. Desde sua fundação em 1955 segue ideais firmados na qualidade do atendimento aos seus pacientes com foco na excelência da assistência eficiência operacional e alta resolubilidade. Pioneiro em várias áreas da medicina foi o primeiro hospital privado a criar um Centro de Terapia Intensiva e de Cirurgia Cardíaca e Pulmonar e sempre esteve alinhado às principais inovações tecnológicas a serviço da saúde.
​Está entre o seleto grupo de hospitais brasileiros com certificação de qualidade internacional pela Joint Commission International (JCI) organização norte-americana que certifica os melhores hospitais do mundo conquistada em 2012. 
Com 410 leitos disponíveis sendo 91 de Unidade de Terapia Intensiva (UTI) o hospital possui estrutura completa para atendimentos de emergência além de estar amplamente capacitado para a realização de exames diagnósticos e tratamentos. Dono de um dos mais modernos centros cirúrgicos do Brasil conta com 22 salas cirúrgicas sendo duas híbridas equipadas com Hemodinâmica e Ressonância Magnética e três exclusivas para cirurgia robótica.
​Hospital tecnológico
Possui desde 2012 o robô Da Vinci capaz de realizar cirurgias robóticas especialmente nas áreas de ginecologia urologia e cirurgia geral​. Em 2017​ adquiriu seu segundo robô com diferenciais como selador de vasos (Vessel Sealer) e sistema de iluminação guiada por fluorescência (Firefly). O corpo clínico inclui proctors e a equipe de enfermagem é capacitada e certificada pela Intuitive Surgical (Houston EUA).


https://www.h9j.com.br/institucional/Paginas/trabalhe-conosco.aspx
headline: Otorrinolaringologista Especialista em Sono Gestão em Saúde

company_description:
KPMG er mest kjent som revisorer forretningskonsulenter og advokater men vi er også mye mer. 
Vi vet hva virksomheter har på toppen av sin agenda derfor har vi bygget ledende fagmiljøer innen områdene som blir viktigst i framtiden: cybersikkerhet bærekraft kompetanse og teknologi. 
Fordi våre råd skal lønne seg og de skal være tilpasset morgendagen både for kundene våre og for samfunnet. 
Da gjelder det å ligge i forkant. 
Å ligge i forkant er lønnsomt. Det er for eksempel bedre å sikre seg mot cyberangrep enn å rydde opp i etterkant. Vi vet fordi vi hjelper til både før under og etter kriser. 
 
Vi vet også at de selskapene som investerer i framtidens teknologi og lykkes med det grønne skiftet ikke bare er med på å redde klimaet de er også med på å skape morgendagens arbeidsplasser.
I KPMG våger vi å stille spørsmål utfordre vise nysgjerrighet og si ting rett frem. Kun da forstår vi kundenes utfordringer og muligheter fullt ut og slik blir vi i stand til å gi bedre råd. Råd som ser mot fremtiden. 

Fordi på sikt er det det som lønner seg.

about:
I used to chase innovation.
Now I search for meaning.
For over 20 years I built companies that I sld and invested in more than 300 startups. I worked alongside brilliant minds to anticipate the next big thing.
I was early. I was fortunate. I was loud.

But something shifted.
I stepped away from the spotlight to walk a quieter path one that’s less about noise and more about impact truth and presence.

I’m still an investor. Still a founder.
But today I care more about depth than disruption.
I invest in deep bold tech but also in people. In potential. In ideas that won’t just scale but serve.

I now spend less time with crowds and more time with remarkable individuals: quiet thinkers spiritual seekers underestimated founders and everyday heroes from every corner of the world.

I’ve chosen to dedicate much of my time to volunteering learning in spiritual centers and going deep into the human experience asking different questions about legacy service and what it means to live a meaningful life.

I believe that in 10 years the real luxury and the real meaning will come from what exists outside of AI:
Real presence. Real relationships. Real life.

The future needs radical innovation radical humanity philosophers and free thinkers.
I want to support both.

If you're building something that matters something that lasts I'd love to hear your story.

about:
Antes de mais nada quero registrar que acredito que qualquer definição de uma pessoa é (por essência) limitante incompleta e geralmente enviesada. Sendo simplista: sou apenas uma pessoa um eterno aprendiz tentando fazer o melhor com o que se tem disponível. Abaixo busquei contextualizar quem eu sou hoje. 

Tive o privilégio de nascer em uma família empreendedora que participou ativamente da criação do setor de saúde privado como o conhecemos hoje. Edson Bueno meu pai e Dulce Pugliese minha atual sócia amiga e conselheira fundaram Amil e tantas outras empresas que são referências no nosso setor. Tive oportunidades incríveis na minha vida como começar a estagiar na saúde aos 16 anos trabalhar e aprender com um grande mestre que foi meu pai uma breve passagem em empresas referência do setor financeiro participar da fusão Amil-UHG (uma das maiores transações americanas no país até hoje) co-fundar a DNA Capital gestora de investimentos especializada na saúde e assumir como CEO da Dasa em 2015. 

Ao longo dos últimos anos passei a adotar uma visão de mundo mais integrada sistêmica e humana. Acredito que como sociedade temos uma oportunidade enorme. Nunca tivemos tanta abundância de capital globalmente tecnologia conhecimento e conexões quanto hoje. Por outro lado temos grandes desafios como a crescente desigualdade avanço de novas tecnologias que ainda não compreendemos completamente e impactos ambientais gravíssimos. Estamos em um ponto de inflexão e o resultado depende inteiramente do nosso nível de consciência. Está cada vez mais evidente que a sociedade é um resultado direto de quem nós somos como indivíduos a interdependência é clara. Portanto cada um de nós tem uma responsabilidade enorme de ser e criar a mudança que queremos ver no mundo. 

Tenho um grande propósito: ser no alcance da minha habilidade e recursos um vetor de transformação para uma sociedade equilibrada livre que age a partir do amor que inclui e compreende que funcione melhor para todos. Tenho um compromisso extraordinário com a saúde do nosso país com o impacto de longo prazo e com a vida. 

Que possamos juntos criar mais abundância diminuir o sofrimento humano e cuidar melhor do nosso planeta. A jornada está apenas começando!
company_description:
A Dasa é uma das maiores empresas de saúde do mundo líder em medicina diagnóstica no Brasil. Trabalha para transformar sua especialização alcance e escala em acesso à saúde de qualidade e cuidado humanizado.

A empresa faz parte da vida de mais de 20 milhões de pessoas por ano com alta tecnologia amplo portfólio de exames e serviços e foco na melhor experiência em saúde. Com mais de 25 mil colaboradores e mais de 350 mil médicos parceiros processa mais de 414 milhões de exames por ano em suas mais de 40 marcas presentes em todo o território nacional.

Essa capilaridade única torna a Dasa a companhia de saúde que mais se relaciona com as pessoas oferecendo soluções conectadas à realidade e à diversidade do país. Com uma governança baseada em gestão disciplinada e capacidade de execução a empresa avança como uma organização inovadora focada e sustentável sempre pautada pela excelência médica e pelo compromisso com a sustentabilidade do setor da saúde.

about:
Allyson was named one of the "Most Influential Women in Tech" by Fast Company a "Tech Titan" by the Washingtonian and "one of the top 30 women entrepreneurs to follow on Twitter" by Forbes for her leadership roles in tech. 

She's a Founding Partner at Rad Campaign GP and Founding Partner at the W Fund and Founder of Women Who Tech that champions and invests in women and allies. 

As cofounder of Rad Campaign she has helped 100+ nonprofits foundations and philanthropists build hard-hitting campaigns and compelling websites focused on increasing advocacy donations and community engagement. Her campaigns have been recognized with several prestigious web awards and featured on several top media networks ranging from CNN to NPR to The Daily Show and BuzzFeed. 

She is passionate about the intersection of social change with technologies and social communities a topic she deeply explores in her nonprofit bestselling book Social Change Anytime Everywhere co-authored by Amy Sample Ward of NTEN. The book is an action-oriented guide that shows nonprofits how to build an advocacy and donor base and mobilize their communities through multifaceted campaigns and by integrating online channels with offline tactics. 

As founder of Women Who Tech she has built a diverse network of 65 000+ engineers entrepreneurs investors and industry leaders. She has produced several Women Who Tech TeleSummits packed with the most inspiring tech changemakers disruptors and startup entrepreneurs ranging from Arianna Huffington Founder of Huffington Post to Clay Shirky and Rashmi Sinah co-founder of SlideShare acquired by LinkedIn. In 2015 Allyson launched the Women Startup Challenge in partnership with Craig Newmark of craigslist and craigconnects to help fund and showcase startups focused on solving problems for people businesses and the planet.

As a GP and Founding Partner at the venture fund W Fund she invests in outstanding tech startups led by innovative founders who are driving the future of tech. 

Allyson sat on the Board of Directors for the League of Women Voters for three terms where she worked with the CEO senior leadership and other board members on guiding the organization's transformation and strategic plan. She continues to serve on committees. She's also been on the advisory boards for Anita Borg Institute Tim O'Reilly's Gov 2.0 Expo and NTEN's NTC Committee. She speaks at conferences globally ranging from SXSW to Personal Democracy Forum BBCON etc. She's a contributor to Forbes Fortune Fast Company and Quartz.
company_description:
Rad Campaign is a full-service web agency that provides web design development online marketing and strategic services to non-profit organizations political campaigns and socially responsible businesses. We have a successful history of using the web to mobilize national organizations community groups coalitions and volunteers around some of the toughest issues facing this country. 

There are many firms that design and develop websites and develop online marketing and social media campaigns. But we also differ in four key ways:

• We bring a level of web strategy to the table that most other firms just can’t. The senior team at Rad Campaign has managed the development and design of websites and online teams across the nonprofit sector. We think like web strategists because we’ve been there – running and winning online campaigns for the last 10+ years. And because our web backgrounds also encompass online advocacy online marketing social media and fundraising – we bring a unique perspective and set of experiences to ensure that websites are built to engage and mobilize your members into action.

• We only take on a handful of clients at a time. We know what it’s like to work with firms who come in for the big pitch and once on board you are one of many. We know our capacity and don’t exceed it.

• We are committed to delivering our clients' vision. We work with them to ensure that their website has its own voice aimed at their target audiences highlighting campaign priorities. We minimize stock photos and don’t use recycled slogans or cookie-cutter web designs so that each website has its own identity and stands out.

• We don’t outsource any of our work unless specifically stated in the proposal. Rad Campaign is deeply committed to campaigns and organizations that want to change the world and socially responsible businesses that want to claim their corner of it.
headline: CoFounder of Rad Campaign Founder of Women Who Tech and Founding Partner at W Fund

about:
Cowabunga! Co-captaining Veryfi with my partner-in-crime Dmitry Birulia.

 THE A-TEAM
We're the A-Team of document data extraction - turning documents from any language geography and format into squeaky clean structured data faster than you can say "Great Scott!" Our secret sauce? First and foremost - the Team! A team that's dedicated to the mission passionate about helping customers and prospects achieve measurable outcomes and easy to speak with.

 VERYFI'S SUPERPOWER
Taking those chaotic unstructured documents and transforming them into pristine structured data in seconds flat. We're talking speed that would make The Flash look like he's running in slow motion.

 TRUST & SECURITY
Your data stays at Veryfi (if you choose to retain it). We don't send it anywhere. Our custom-built machine learning models are trained on hundreds of millions of real-world documents running on our own Nvidia DGX H100s. Even Batman would be jealous of our hardware! And yes we're SOC2 Type 2 certified - because even superheroes need security clearance!

Our Silicon Valley-based squad provides Day-1 ready solutions with support that's friendlier than your neighborhood Spider-Man. We're the go-to sidekicks for FinTech Accounting Healthcare and CPG brands who need their data extraction done right.

 PREVIOUSLY...
Before Veryfi I was wearing multiple superhero capes: crafting HIPAA-compliant solutions as CTO at VectorCare to revolutionize healthcare logistics and hunting down digital coupons at Coupons.com like they were Crocs in the wild.

But wait there's more! Back in the Land Down Under I cut my teeth at AMP Ltd (Australia's FinTech heavyweight) where I got to learn from the Jedi masters of corporate architecture. They showed me all the secret passages of financial services - from planning and strategy to banking and tax. And yes I even ventured into the ancient arts of COBOL (fun fact: I once taught Object-Oriented COBOL at uni - please don't hold it against me! ).

Ok I will stop waffling and let you rest. Thank you for making it this far.
Onwards and Upwards

about:
I believe in the power of UK science and technology to unlock UK's productivity

As CEO of Midlands Mindforge I am interested in how we best support and grow UK science and technology businesses particularly in accessing capital investing for the long-term. Please message me if you are also on a crusade to get this right!

I understand how to balance the needs of investors and companies that deliver impact by building diverse investment teams of data nerds! My teams will tell you that research is at the heart of every great decision and that I lead with insight clarity and optimism.

Whether it is working with Annas Anam to make textiles from agricultural waste or finding an alternative to the disaster of disposable coffee cups with Bockatech impact is a golden thread that runs through my life and career.

At Unilever Ventures I set up their sustainable investment practice alongside co-founding the global Young Sustainable Entrepreneurs competition. 

As a family we continue to support the building of Loziba wildlife reserve – to protect endangered wildlife and provide sustainable income for local communities - in my childhood home of Kwa Zulu Natal.
current_position_description:
I strongly believe that innovators come in all shapes in sizes and it is only by tapping into 100% of the Midlands' talent pool that we can turn the UK into a global scientific superpower. Through Midlands Mindforge we want to leverage the incredible work already taking place in the region to create the conditions where local university spinout and start-up businesses can genuinely flourish. By helping create a financial ecosystem for entrepreneurs we can help showcase the Midlands' talent to the world – and bring the world to the Midlands. 
The university partners Midlands Mindforge work with have already shown an incredible commitment to work together to solve the underlying problem faced by spinouts and start-ups struggling to expand: a deficit of funding and financing opportunities. Am delighted to have the opportunity to work with these institutions and our other partners in the region to provide a growth platform for the world-class science and tech work taking place across the Midlands.
current_position_2_description: Carbon13 is the venture builder for the climate emergency - a great founder-first programme helping us solve our climate emergency.
company_description:
Midlands Mindforge is an ambitious patient capital investment company aiming to transform ground-breaking science and technology into successful businesses with the potential to positively impact our world and accelerate the commercialisation of research from our partner universities - Aston Birmingham Cranfield Keele Leicester Loughborough Nottingham and Warwick.

Midlands Mindforge aims to invests in science-based companies that we expect to have a transformational impact based in one of the world's historic global innovation hubs: the UK's Midlands region. 

Our mission is to work with our partner universities and other early-stage IP-rich businesses across the Midlands to show the world the amazing and real opportunities that have the potential to positively impact our world.

about:
After two decades as a successful technology entrepreneur Jared co-founded Pioneer and then Rebel Fund a top-decile Y Combinator-focused seed fund. His venture funds have raised hundreds of millions in capital invested in hundreds of Y Combinator startups and seeded companies now valued in the tens of billions of dollars and growing. 

Rebel (www.rebelfund.vc) aims to invest in the top 10% of startups (top 0.1% of applicants) from Y Combinator the #1 accelerator in the world with 100+ unicorns and $800B+ in portfolio company value. The fund's investing partners are accomplished Y Combinator alumni who have co-founded companies now valued at over $100B in aggregate — including Reddit Instacart Cruise Gusto Scribd Rappi and more — and together invested in hundreds of startups. Rebel has unique access to top Y Combinator startups with a nearly 100% deal win rate typically pre-Demo Day.  The fund utilizes a proprietary machine-learning algorithm called Rebel Theorem 4.0 to help validate and screen potential investments building a diversified portfolio of Y Combinator startups that is statistically powered to outperform.

He previously founded online market research companies Infosurv & Intengo and lead them to a strategic acquisition by Savanta / Next 15 Communications (LON:NFC). CrowdMed his YC-backed startup (W13) raised millions in venture capital from top funds like a16z NEA Khosla Ventures and Greylock plus individuals like Sam Altman Patrick Dempsey Elad Gil and Anne Wojcicki and was acquired in 2024. 

Heyman was formerly a consultant at Bain & Company and graduated Magna Cum Laude from the University of Texas at Austin with majors in Business Honors and Marketing. He is the lead inventor on multiple US patents related to prediction market technology. He also serves as a Trustee of the philanthropic Heyman Family Foundation.

about:
Nico Vandervelpen is Managing Partner of Bioqube Ventures a specialist life sciences investment firm which he co-founded in 2015 together with Debora Dumont. 

In 2020 Bioqube Ventures launched “Bioqube Factory Fund I (BFF I)” a VC fund dedicated to advancing exciting science to breakthrough therapies for patients. BFF I invests across Europe and the USA. 

From 2016-2018 Bioqube Ventures co-managed an investment and incubation model resulting in the set-up and support of a local ecosystem of 10 companies on the Janssen R&D site in Beerse Belgium. Investments included amongst others S-Biomedic (acquired by Beiersdorf) Syndesi (acquired by Abbvie) and Calypso (acquired by Novartis).
 
Nico previously served in a variety of capacities at LRM a Belgium-based private equity and venture capital firm including most recently as the funds Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining LRM Nico was a senior executive at Ernst & Young a global Big 4 advisory firm. 

He served on the board of directors of several public and private life sciences companies and has led several dozen international venture capital transactions and M&A deals. 

Nico was nominated for the 2018 Bloomberg50 list “Ones to Watch”. 

He holds a Masters degree in commercial and business engineering from Hasselt University as well as a Master in Accountancy from VLEKHO Business School - Brussels.
company_description:
Bioqube Ventures is a global life sciences investment firm with offices in Belgium and the United States. The firm focuses on companies developing first- or best-in-class therapeutics to address major unmet medical needs. Bioqube builds balanced portfolios and supports companies from inception through early clinical milestones. For more information please visit www.bioqubeventures.com

Bioqube Ventures is dedicated to funding therapeutic innovations:

- A life sciences venture capital fund – dedicated to advancing exciting science in European and US ecosystems to breakthrough therapies for patients.

- A fit-for-purpose dual investment model – besides more classical investments in investment rounds we have special attention for venture creation projects that require additional experiments prior to creating new ventures. With our in-house factory model we are able to translate exciting science into trailblazing companies.

- A hands-on approach – the team is a mix of fund managers sector experts and serial entrepreneurs that have a proven track record in successfully leading companies on their growth paths. We believe in putting our expertise at work where it matters.

about:
As a Managing Director of iSelect Fund I have over 30 years of experience in innovation entrepreneurship venture capital and technology strategy. I have a passion for solving the big problems of our day from agtech to healthcare to the Internet of Things and I believe that innovation is the economy's superpower.

At iSelect Fund we leverage the power of technology to bring entrepreneurs and investors together working with tech-focused startups in growth areas like agriculture food logistics materials and more. We provide qualified individual investors with access to a diversified portfolio of promising early-stage private venture investments that have been evaluated by an elite committee of successful entrepreneurs and accomplished venture investors. Our investment model helps entrepreneurs bring their ideas to market while allowing investors to profit from those innovations and support the future of American economic growth.
company_description:
iSelect recognized the looming crises of diabetes and obesity early on pinpointing poor nutrition as the root cause. Since 2014 our mission has been to harness the forces of Creative Destruction in agriculture and health technology innovation to address these critical issues. We invest in pioneering companies that are redefining the food and health system emphasizing yield taste nutrition and sustainability to combat obesity reduce waste and tackle metabolic diseases.

Our portfolio boasts over 60 companies illustrating our commitment and impact. These firms are advancing crop quality minimizing fertilizer use and innovating in healthcare to cut costs and fast-track health improvements. 

With time we have shifted our focus from yield to taste and nutrition and now to enhancing nutritional density targeting the root cause in obesity and metabolic—a market with vast untapped potential and significant implications for US GDP growth.

iSelect provides investors with broad exposure to innovators in the AgTech and HealthTech sectors offering our 500+ investors the chance to increase investments in high-performing companies and deliver insightful market intelligence that influences both venture and public market strategies. Our approach gives investors a unique blend of risk mitigation and opportunity maximization in sectors poised for substantial growth.

Our network of investors entrepreneurs and early adopters reshapes the landscape of ag food and health creating sustainable impact driving economic growth investor returns and building a healthier future for all. With our deep human network of market insight robust portfolio and commitment to innovation we're not just investing in companies we're investing in a healthier more sustainable world.

#AgTech #HealthTech#SustainableInvesting #FoodTech #ImpactInvesting #AgricultureInnovation #NutritionTech #Biotech #FutureOfFood

company_description:
Kleiner Device Labs - Advancing Minimally Invasive Spinal Surgery™

During 25 years of active spinal surgical practice and over 6 000 surgeries Dr. Jeffrey Kleiner became increasingly aware that instrument design and quality played a significant role in the clinical outcome of spinal surgery. He recognized key gaps in the instrumentation available to spinal surgeons and this led him to develop a series of innovative solutions. 

In 2013 Dr. Kleiner established Kleiner Device Labs to build and sell innovative spinal surgical products. These novel and advanced tools deliver improvements in efficiency and safety for patients and enable surgeons to perform more effective and less complicated fusion surgery. 

Kleiner Device Lab's first product a Bi-Directional Graft Funnel (KG™1) works with any flowable biologic graft material provides a more efficient and safer delivery vehicle for bone graft extenders facilitates grafting in front of or alongside all types of interbody cages and can eliminate or reduce surgeon dependency on BMP.

Building on the underlying philosophy behind the KG™1 Kleiner Device Labs developed the KG™2 Surge™ Flow-Thru Interbody Implant in 2021. No other device integrates implant positioning and graft delivery like the KG™2 Surge™. The system not only maximizes successful outcomes for patients (while simplifying the procedure for surgeons) but reduces costs for healthcare providers and insurers as well.

Kleiner Device Labs has a broad patent portfolio and a runway of innovative minimally invasive spinal surgical products. These strategies are equally effective in open theater surgical technique as well.
headline: Investor Relations Strategic Finance Board Member

about:
Peter co-founded Lux Capital with the idea that in order to have the biggest impact on the future one should support the most scientifically and technologically ambitious ventures. His goal: to seek out founders developing things most people thought would not work yet if they did would become so intrinsic to our way of life that we would someday take them for granted.

Today Lux supports a wide range of once-impossible-sounding advancements including 3D printing and imaging nuclear waste cleanup machine learning and robots that fly or conduct microsurgery.

Peter led Lux's investments in Auris Health (acquired by Johnson & Johnson for up to $6 billion making it one of top 10 VC-backed private M&A transactions of all-time) Everspin Technologies (NASDAQ: MRAM) Lux Research (acquired by Bregal Sagemount) Luxtera (acquired by Cisco for $660 million) SiBEAM (acquired by Silicon Image) Transphorm and Vium (acquired by Recursion). Current investments include Avail Bright Machines Flex Logix Lux Health Tech Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: LUXAU) Matterport and Ripcord. In 2003 Peter led the spin-off of Lux Research. As its founding CEO he helped build Lux Research into the leading emerging-technology research firm.

Peter began his career at Lehman Brothers where he worked in the firm's top-ranked Equity Research group. He was a Chancellor's Scholar and graduated cum laude from Syracuse University's Newhouse School and was the Founding President of its first venture organization Future Business Leaders and Entrepreneurs. He has been a guest on CNBC and Bloomberg TV and speaker at Columbia Cornell MIT Stanford Yale and the National Science Foundation.

about:
Have you ever seen a promising medical breakthrough fail to reach patients who desperately need it? I have—and I've dedicated my career to solving this problem.

Founder and CEO of THRIVE Consulting I translate scientific innovations into commercial successes that save and improve lives globally. My passion lies in ensuring great science becomes accessible medicine.

With over 20 years of experience spanning North America Europe and Asia I serve as a trusted strategic advisor to senior leaders executive teams and boards across the life sciences sector. My global perspective has been shaped by living and working across three continents giving me unique insights into diverse healthcare systems and market dynamics.

I bring a uniquely integrated perspective that connects insights to strategy to execution addressing complex business challenges at all levels of an organization. My focus encompasses three interconnected areas:
* Developing insight-driven launch and growth strategies
* Aligning cross-functional teams toward shared objectives
* Building organizational and individual capabilities that ensure sustained commercial excellence

THRIVE's work has delivered exceptional results translating to over 90% of business from repeat clients and referrals. For example supported launches have generated over $100B in cumulative sales (to-date) and clients received an average ROI of 65x on their investment into THRIVE launch support.

Beyond my consulting work I serve as an investor in and strategic advisor to innovative early-stage biotechnology and health technology companies.

company_description:
THRIVE is a specialized strategy firm helping leaders and organizations make high-stakes strategic choices in uncertainty.

We partner with global healthcare and biopharma leaders innovative biotechs and family office principals on strategy across North America Europe and Asia-Pacific.

Our two core pillars:
1) Launch Strategy & Launch Excellence
We design winning launch strategies and embed repeatable launch excellence capabilities — from early launch shaping through launch readiness and post-launch performance optimization.
2) Futures Architecture
We help boards leadership teams and family office principals stress-test their strategies map strategic optionality and make confident decisions when the range of possible futures has never been wider. The methodology behind this work is the THRIVE Futures Architecture™.

Both practices share the same foundation: the conviction that uncertainty is not an obstacle to strategy — it is the design problem strategy must solve and a real source of competitive advantage.

100+ engagements. >90% repeat/referral business. $100B+ in cumulative sales from launches we've supported.

Design for Uncertainty. 
Launch with Precision. 
Thrive by Design

IGC – The First Reverse VC Fund™

Accelerating breakthrough companies with proven commercialization signals.

Innovative Growth Capital (IGC) is a GTM acceleration fund investing in transformative technologies backed by strong commercialization signals and validated market demand. 

Our proprietary Reverse VC™ model prioritizes outcomes first driving scale rapid Go-To-Market traction revenue growth and faster exits.

Reverse VC: A Demand-Driven Investment Model

IGC reverses the venture process focusing on outcomes — starting with corporate demand not guesswork. 

Leveraging our ReverseVision™ platform we identify corporate demand signals and match them with the right emerging technology companies. 

This approach ensures:

• Accelerated Growth: Market demand fuels rapid growth.
• Stronger Deal Terms: Strategic positioning and leverage maximize value.
• De-Risked Investing: Innovation that is already in demand from Global 5000 companies.

We invest in the future we want to live in—where human potential is elevated the planet is protected and transformative technologies power both.

about:
I’m Rishi Sharma — a searcher operator and the writer behind Mindful Capital.

I’m on a mission to acquire and operate one exceptional business—likely in physical security or B2B services—where I can bring long-term thinking operational clarity and a deep respect for what already works.

My background isn’t the typical investor-to-operator arc. I’ve helped scale a video surveillance company through meaningful growth and a successful exit. I’ve worked alongside teams in VC and private equity evaluating deals and digging into what actually drives value. Across those chapters one idea kept surfacing:

The best businesses don’t just perform—they endure.
And the best operators don’t posture—they protect.

That belief is what anchors my approach today.

I’m not chasing scale for scale’s sake. I’m here to continue someone else’s legacy—quietly carefully and with conviction. The kind of conviction that only comes from being close to the operations. The kind of leadership that trades flash for focus.

To sharpen my own thinking and give others a window into the journey I write weekly at Mindful Capital. I explore the intersection of operating frameworks decision-making and small business leadership—especially where AI service businesses and behavioral insights meet. Recent essays include reflections on signal vs. noise in SMB ops how Edward Thorp’s blackjack strategy maps to risk in ETA and the quiet leverage in legacy service industries.

There’s a quote from Irv Grousbeck that lives in my head:

“Regret for something you’ve done can be tempered by time.
Regret for what you haven’t done is inconsolable.”

This journey is how I’m choosing not to look back with regret. One business. One opportunity to build something that lasts.

If you’re a founder thinking about succession an investor looking for clarity and discipline or someone simply curious about how this all works—I’d love to connect.

The Company prioritizes brine projects characterized by high-grade resources robust infrastructure skilled labor and streamlined permitting. The Company aims to achieve sustainable commercial-scale lithium production via the application of a scalable and fully-integrated Direct Lithium Extraction ("DLE") and purification process. The Company's signature projects the Phase 1A Project and the South West Arkansas Project are located on the Smackover Formation in southern Arkansas a region with a longstanding and established brine processing industry. In addition the Company has an interest in certain mineral leases located in the Mojave Desert in San Bernardino County California.

company_description:
ENABLING NEUROTECHNOLOGY
Paradromics builds brain-computer interface (BCI) technologies for seamless human-technology integration designed to restore and enhance human capabilities. By capturing brain activity at the resolution of individual neurons our high-data-rate platform creates a foundation for the most advanced BCI applications. With each new application we will create human capabilities that transcend disabilities and eventually biology itself.

THE MISSION
Data-driven BCI-based technologies for brain health
Our technology will help millions with unmet medical needs suffering from paralysis and movement disorders to chronic pain addiction depression and other mental health conditions.

ABOUT
Matt Angle Ph.D. (CEO) founded Paradromics to build a high-data-rate BCI platform capable of addressing critical unmet clinical needs. With early funding from the NIH and DARPA the company developed its core neurotechnology and by 2019 shifted focus to its first product: the Connexus® BCI.
 
Connexus is designed to restore communication through text synthesized speech and computer control for people with severe motor impairments including those caused by ALS stroke or spinal cord injury. Backed by two FDA Breakthrough Device Designations and a successful first-in-human recording in May 2025 Paradromics achieved its first human implantation of the Connexus BCI as part of the FDA-approved Connect-One study in June 2026 marking a major milestone toward delivering its first product to people living with severe motor impairment.

Stephen earned a B.A. with Highest Distinction as a varsity athlete at UNC-Chapel Hill ranked 8th in a class of 4 000. He spent one year at the Université de Paris VII and the Institut d’Etudes Politiques completing an on-site photo and audio journal of the 1989-90 revolutions in Eastern Europe including hammering chunks off the Berlin Wall.

After a fellowship at the United Nations Industrial Development Organization in NYC Stephen served in post-communist Eastern Europe as a Peace Corps Volunteer where he was honored by colleagues and students as Teacher of the Year. 

Stephen returned to the U.S. to earn a J.D. from Stanford Law School and a graduate fellowship at the Stanford Center on Conflict and Negotiation. Working in 1995 as an Honors Intern at the FBI’s International Relations Branch in Washington DC and the American Embassy in Canada and subsequently as an intelligence Research Specialist for the FBI’s Olympic Squad at the 1996 Olympics in Atlanta Stephen was selected to carry the Olympic torch. 

Alongside his entrepreneurial work Stephen has served as a board director to dozens of community organizations and companies including the Chamber of Commerce Trust for Public Land River City Company Rotary CreateHere CARTA Parks & Outdoors Tech Council Metro Ideas Project TheatreCentre Velocity2040 InnovateHere Variable CoLab Lyndhurst Foundation Benwood Foundation and general partner for the Chattanooga Renaissance Fund. With the birth of his first daughter in 2012 Stephen helped catalyze an international research effort to battle cystic fibrosis.

Stephen is a multi-patented inventor black belt surfer public speaker Marshall Fellow and alum of Harvard Business School’s Young American Leaders Program U Michigan’s Executive Education program and Leadership Tennessee. He has worked or studied in more than 4 countries and traveled in 50. Stephen has also accidentally suspended a forklift across a drainage ditch appeared on the cover of Inc. company_description:
Delegator is a digital agency focused on digital advertising digital strategy web and creative solutions for companies seeking to be more profitable and competitive online. 

Delegator was founded by digital experts with a human-centric data-driven approach. From Google ads and analytics to Bing Facebook Instagram LinkedIn Amazon YouTube TikTok and more complemented by a full stack of creative services Delegator focuses on real-world results vs vanity metrics for our clients.

Finding an agency to entrust with your company's most important revenue channels is a challenge. At Delegator trust is important. We invite you to be skeptical. We maintain a healthy skepticism of typical agencies' array of vanity metrics ("No revenue to speak of but we drove over 100M impressions and you're trending on Buzz-Hype!"). Delegator drives results that matter the most to clients like old-school dollar-based ROI. Delegator then backs up those results with precise data analytics.

current_position_description:
Dayrize started with an ambitious purpose. To enable businesses and consumers to bring consumption within planetary and societal boundaries.

The biggest impact of companies in the consumer goods industry comes from the products they make and sell. However most companies were not measuring impact at the product level as traditional product impact assessments were complex expensive and time-consuming. Dayrize decided to solve this and make impact assessment accessible for all businesses by pulling together a team of the world's best environmental scientists industrial ecologists and technology experts. The result is that Dayrize created the most advanced impact measurement technology that provides impact transparency throughout the production process making it easy for both consumers and business to understand and ultimately reduce their environmental and social impact.
company_description:
Dayrize is an Agentic AI platform that helps businesses understand the environmental and social impact of the products they make and sell.

Our system has measured the impact and risk of over 30 million consumer products across 70 000+ materials providing science-based insights into carbon water land use circularity and more.

We support companies in navigating sustainability challenges by offering structured product-level analytics that align with evolving regulatory requirements such as CSRD EPR and the Digital Product Passport.

The platform enables users to assess and manage the impact of their full product range establish baselines model footprint reductions and improve data maturity without the need for manual spreadsheets or complex integrations.

Our goal is to make sustainability data accessible consistent and actionable - supporting better decisions across global supply chains.

Roland Ligtenberg sees opportunities where others see complexity. He's relentlessly resourceful unembarrassable and fundamentally anti-fragile. Roland is a master of zero-to-one execution driven by a high-agency mindset and the instinctive ability to cultivate and exploit powerful network effects. At Housecall Pro he architected growth loops and vibrant community ecosystems that turned ordinary users into passionate advocates fueling compounding growth that competitors could neither copy nor ignore. He personally fostered one of the most engaged user communities in tech hosting live events and masterminds that inspired thousands of home service professionals.

His path has been unconventional embodying the intellectual versatility and adaptability of someone constantly expanding his circle of competence. Fluent in multiple languages and having lived across several countries Roland brings a global perspective to the table yet his entrepreneurial roots remain firmly anchored in the heart of Silicon Valley. From running a scuba diving outfit to competing as a semi-pro poker player from SMB consultant to EDM promoter Roland’s career defies simple categorization. Each experience reinforced Roland’s conviction that enduring success emerges from cultivating clarity of thought long-term compounding games harnessing leverage and calmly navigating uncertainty.

At Qualcomm Labs Roland launched innovative mobile products years ahead of the mainstream embracing first-principles thinking and mastering the skill of rapid continuous learning. His leadership style champions autonomous teams empowering talented individuals to thrive independently free from unnecessary constraints. Peers describe him as having an uncanny ability to reframe complex problems with clarity challenging everyone around him to elevate their game.

Roland Ligtenberg isn’t playing by conventional rules—he's rewriting them. company_description:
Cowboy Space Corporation is building a power grid in outer space for artificial intelligence. Using an integrated system of satellites and rockets we will send high-performance compute and optical data transmission to Low Earth Orbit.

Our constellation of satellites Stampede will harness abundant solar power to run on-orbit GPU data centers. With each launch Stampede grows the power and compute capacity for humanity. Earth's energy grid can't run at the pace of AI. We can.

AI is driving the largest infrastructure buildout in recent history and the power grid on planet Earth can't keep pace. In major US markets average grid connection lead times for new data centers can run 5-7 years or more. Meanwhile AI demand is flat-out outgrowing Earth's pastures.

Full-Stack Architecture: Traditional architecture treats the rocket as a workhorse and the satellite as freight. In our system the rocket's upper stage is the satellite itself. It's a 1-megawatt data center with active thermal management and integrated compute designed as one unified vehicle from the ground up.
We trim the fat on redundant structure and avionics dedicating every possible kilogram of compute to Low Earth Orbit.

By owning our manufacturing and dedicated launch sites we vertically integrate core technologies that enable deploying compute at scale.

We've raised a $275M Series B at a $2B valuation led by Index Ventures with participation from new investors IVP Blossom Capital and SAIC alongside existing investors Breakthrough Energy Ventures Construct Capital Andreessen Horowitz NEA Interlagos and Baiju Bhatt.

company_description:
United Founders is a pan-European venture fund and founder community backing the next wave of European decacorns. We partner with bold builders from day one—bringing capital expertise and a deeply embedded network to help frontier-tech startups scale globally.

We believe Europe has the talent to build world-leading technology companies what's missing is coordinated support. That's why we've united 100+ accomplished entrepreneurs operators and domain experts to invest not only money but thousands of founder hours into the continent's most ambitious teams.

Our Community includes pioneers such as Laurent Philonenko (Cisco Asana) Richard Valtr (Mews) Florian Seibel (Quantum Systems) Alissa Hsu Lynch (The Honest Company) and Michal Pechoucek (Avast/Gen). Together they form our "Founder Force": an active network that helps teams refine strategy build products open doors to customers and accelerate fundraising.

With hubs across continent we connect Europe's fragmented innovation centers—giving founders early access to key markets and talent. We back visionary teams in deeptech AI MedTech dual-use & security Industry 4.0 and sustainable technologies.

What makes United Founders different:
• Founder Force: 100+ accomplished builders giving time & capital
• Early access to frontier research & talent pools
• 72-hour feedback cycle for fast decisions
• Tailored advisory boards for every startup

Our ambition is simple: help Europe build transformational companies that shape the future of global technology.

If you're building something important—get in touch.

current_position_2_description:
We aim to invest in our own capital in 200 companies across North America each year: roughly half are the typical “tech possibility” and the other half are what we call “main street realities.” We do this because it’s important… and we do this because we’re constructing the ideal investment portfolio.

In order to make this happen we drive back and forth across North America to visit the places that startups actually start (and grow) their businesses. Since 2016 we’ve driven 100 000+ miles visited 150+ cities and sat down to chat with thousands of founders.

At each stop we create and/or participate a series of events for entrepreneurs investors and community leaders. Along the way we’ve mentor thousands of entrepreneurs visited incubators and coworking spaces held investor dinners and jumped into the local tech culture. And we love bringing our friends too. (If you’re an investor entrepreneur corporate executive or community leader join us -- we'd love to connect you with your peers.)

Over the past 10+ years we’ve flown 1 000 000 miles raised tens of millions of dollars for our venture funds and invested in thousands of companies around the world. We know startups and small businesses better than anyone else. And they know us.

These days we’re doing it all with our family in a pickup truck and a custom-built Airstream travel trailer. (Because America.)

Check it out: www.resultsjunkies.com

company_description:
Pioneira no Sul do Brasil a VENTIUR é a primeira aceleradora da região atuando desde 2013 para impulsionar startups e conectar empreendedores visionários a uma qualificada rede de investidores. Reconhecida como a melhor aceleradora pelo Prêmio Nacional de Empreendedorismo Inovador da Anprotec acreditamos no poder da inovação para transformar o mundo.

Nosso processo de aceleração combina investimento financeiro e smart money oferecendo mentorias estratégicas e conexões de alto impacto. Mais do que fomentar bons negócios buscamos grandes empreendedores proporcionando as ferramentas necessárias para que suas startups cresçam gerem empregos distribuam riqueza e revolucionem a sociedade.

Com mais de 100 startups investidas 8 exits e mais de 500 investidores conectados seguimos mobilizando talentos e recursos para construir um futuro mais inovador e promissor.

Além da aceleração de startups a VENTIUR se especializou em Corporate Ventures com forte atuação em Corporate Venture Capital (CVC) e na estruturação de novas iniciativas de inovação corporativa que chamamos de New Ventures. Utilizamos nossa experiência para apoiar empresas que desejam ampliar fronteiras impulsionar a transformação digital e gerar valor por meio da tecnologia. Estruturamos soluções completas e personalizadas conectando nossa expertise às necessidades estratégicas de cada cliente com foco em inovação crescimento sustentável e geração de impacto.
