about:
Saif Karmi is an entrepreneur to the core. Born & raised in Columbus Ohio. Currently residing between Ohio & Miami Florida. Saif has been recognized as an early age entrepreneur having built multiple companies by the age of 18 successfully growing these businesses into well oiled machines in under 5 years. Saif believes in working hard every single day and finding solutions to complex problems with turnkey value on both ends created and executed through the team that you build in your organization and with the integrity you deliver.

Saif is experienced in growing start-ups from ground level strategy planning sales execution & business development. 

Saif is Co-Founder & C.O.O. for Midwest Gas HQ in Dublin Ohio. Midwest Gas is a full service provider for all off-spec fuels had begun this company with a single truck in 2016 to an entire fleet of new tankers and recycling facilities. Midwest Gas operates and actively services 26 states all in the Eastern hemisphere of the United States. We are your off spec fuel partners.

Saif also serves as C.O.O. & Managing Member for Karmi Environmental LLC dba E.M.C. Oil & Roll Off based in Miami Florida. Since 1985 E.M.C. Oil has been committed to providing South Florida with quality environmental waste management solutions. From used oil recycling to soil remediation E.M.C. Oil offers a variety of environmental services and the expertise needed to get the job done efficiently and safely. E.M.C. Oil is family-owned and operated so you can count on us to provide friendly reliable service and hold a high standard of honesty and integrity in everything we do. 
Acquired under Karmi Environmental in April 2021.

Industries

Gasoline Diesel Jet Fuel Transmix Used Oil & Waste Water Recycling and transport. Roll Off. Emergency Spill Response. Hazardous Emergency Response. Parking Management. Residential & Commerical Real Estate. AI Technology. NFT Trading. Angel Investing.
company_description: Fuel recovery is an innovative process that allows forward-thinking companies like Midwest Gas to take surplus recovered fuel from our clients and recycle them back to usability. Our entire process is both conscious to safety and environmental standards ensuring that all fuel is handled with the most regulated level of care. We are dedicated to extending the life of usable fuel and providing our clients a significant opportunity to increase revenue.

about:
Hi I'm Arjun Vaidya. I was a D2C founder & now a early stage consumer investor. I built Dr. Vaidya's to India's largest Ayurveda brand online and took it to an acquisition. I now run an early stage consumer focused VC fund called V3 Ventures. I'm also an active angel investor and mentor to brands in India's startup ecosystem. If you're an early-stage founder DM me - I'm happy to chat!

Here's my story:

'Vaidya' my last name means Ayurvedic doctor and I come from 150 yrs of Ayurveda legacy. I grew up with asthma and after 14 yrs of treatment I was cured. More than just being a family legacy I became a believer in the the science.

In 2009 I went to Brown University for my undergrad. I witnessed the natural and organic products revolution there. I also saw yoga become a multibillion-dollar industry repackaged for modern consumers. This made me think about the opportunity we had with Ayurveda…

In 2013 I moved back to India and joined a consumer sector focused growth private equity fund called L Catterton. Here I spent time understanding and investing in the Indian consumer story. I was also fortunate to see the advent of e-commerce in India closely.

In this time my grandfather passed and so I decided to action the promise I had made him. 

In October 2016 I quit my job to take on my family's Ayurveda legacy. Dr. Vaidya's repackaged the ancient Indian science of Ayurveda for modern consumers and emerged as India's largest Ayurveda brand online. In 4 years we successfully reached 2m+ consumers across 16k+ pin codes in India and launched 80 products and clocked 5k+ orders per day!

I was the first Ayurvedic Entrepreneur to be featured in the Forbes 30 Under 30 Asia List for and Business World 40 Under 40 List! We raised a Series A from the USD 4b RP Sanjv Goenka Group and evetually excited to them in 2021 as India's largest Ayurveda brand online. 

Post the exit I have become an active early stage investor. I run a fund called V3 Ventures in partnership with Verlinvest that invests in seed to Series A consumer startups. Some of our notable bets include Kuku FM Go Zero Ugaoo Deconstruct Dil Foods The Hosteller and Antinorm. 
 
Outside work I'm a young parent part Brown University's Young Alum Advisory Council. I'm also a massive sports fan (love cricket football Padel pickleball and squash) and a marathon runner. 

I am also an investing Titan on the recent Zee TV pitch show called Ideabaaz and run a fun pitching IP on Instagram called 'Pickle and Pitch'!

To get in touch/collaborate email me on Arjunvaidya.work@gmail.com

company_description:
Foundation Capital was founded in 1995. As an early-stage venture capital firm our fintech enterprise and consumer investments have reinvented industries and defined new markets. For over a quarter of a century—through boom and bust prosperity or calamity—Foundation Capital has endured evolved and thrived with over $3B assets under management 34 IPOs and ICOs and 80+ acquisitions to our name. Building companies is in our bones. 

We back individuals who want to nudge the world ahead in some way using a transformative business as their fulcrum. Great companies like Apple or Amazon or Netflix aren't formed from code and corporate charters. They're built on a foundation of dreams and desires raised up through struggle and sacrifice. For such companies to succeed the people who start and lead them have to want success badly. It has to come from the deepest part of them—a hunger to create something consequential something lasting a need to prove themselves whether out of a sense of mission or a yearning for significance or a heart full for disobedience. We look for people who believe—even if they would never speak it out loud—that the purpose of life is to be briefly extraordinary.

We think that since the beginning of invention humanity has advanced because the remarkable have pushed us forward. Because select women and men of their times have dared to think different to build it better to do what's never been done. Across the ages we've had many names for these people. Today at Foundation Capital: we call them founders.

It started with helping a friend break into venture capital.

No playbook.
No insider access.
Just honest conversations resume feedback and warm introductions.

That small effort made one thing clear. Talent wasn't the problem. Access was.

So I kept helping. One person became a few. A few became a community.
And that's how Break Into VC™ came to life.

Today I'm the Founder of Break Into VC™ a platform built to make the VC and private capital ecosystem more transparent merit driven and human.

What this journey has grown into:

• 8 000+ professionals across VC PE IB and startups in our network
• 200+ carefully selected members in curated communities
• 120+ closed door events roundtables and meetups
• 3 000+ founders investors and operators hosted
• Talent mandates delivered across India the Middle East and SE Asia

• Investment platforms institutions & people from like Lightspeed Sinar Mas Blume Ventures Alteria Capital Pentathlon Ventures accel & many more.
• Ecosystem partners including Google Oracle Yahaa capital global JetSynthesis HSBC & many more.
• LPs family offices and HNIs through private invitation only conversations

Break Into VC today spans:
• Talent placements for funds and growth stage companies
• Learning programs for people transitioning into investing
• High trust communities for investors and operators
• Closed door LP family office and emerging manager roundtables

What matters most to me hasn't changed since day one:
• Building trust before scale
• People over pitch decks
• Long term ecosystem value over short term outcomes

If you're building a fund backing founders navigating capital or simply trying to find your way into this ecosystem I'm always open to a conversation.

company_description:
Semgrep is the leader in code security for builders. Teams catch flag and fix real issues before they ship powered by security that learns as you build. Built for builders and trusted by security the platform unifies SAST SCA and secrets scanning embedding protection directly into the development workflow so security begins where code is written and lives where developers work. Semgrep combines deterministic static analysis with AI reasoning to power detection triage and remediation. This approach helps teams uncover real vulnerabilities prioritize reachable risks and fix issues faster. Customers report up to 80% fewer false positives across Code and Supply Chain with 95% of findings validated by security reviewers across more than 6 million results.

Founded in San Francisco Semgrep is backed by Menlo Ventures Felicis Ventures Lightspeed Venture Partners Redpoint Ventures and Sequoia Capital. It is recognized by Gartner in Application Security Testing and trusted by leading organizations including Snowflake Dropbox and Figma. Learn more at semgrep.dev.

In case deterrence fails the U.S. military is prepared to fight and win decisively against any adversary. 

Headed by Secretary of War Pete Hegseth the Department is not only in charge of the military it also employs a topnotch civilian workforce. With more than 1.3 million men and women on active duty and 742 000 civilian personnel we are also the nation's largest employer. 

The Pentagon headquarters of the Department of War is one of the largest office buildings in the world. Built in 1941 by the U.S. Army the Pentagon has 17.5 miles of corridors yet it takes only seven minutes to walk between any two points in the building. 

Department of War personnel are the backbone of America's national security. They represent the diverse makeup of our nation and support not only those on active duty but also families veterans and retirees through education training and benefit programs. 

Anything you want to do – on land sea air or space -- you can do in service to your nation by joining the Department of War. Search for Jobs and Internships at USAJobs.gov.

http://dodcio.defense.gov/SocialMedia/UserAgreement.aspx

company_description:
CareBridge is the nation's leading value-based care provider for members receiving home and community-based services (HCBS). CareBrige partners with managed Medicaid and Medicare plans to maximize the health independence and quality of life for members receiving HCBS. CareBridge's solutions include 24/7 Member Support Decision Support Electronic Visit Verification (EVV) and Data Aggregation.
 
24/7 Member Support is CareBridge's clinical model designed to improve health outcomes for individuals receiving home and community-based services. CareBridge's virtual-first program provides members and their caregivers with a cellular-enabled tablet that gives them access 24 hours a day 7 days a week to CareBridge's interdisciplinary medical team of physicians psychiatrists pharmacists nurses and social workers.
 
Decision Support is an innovative solution that provides actionable recommendations on the type of home and community-based services that will help members achieve optimal independence in their lives. To develop these recommendations CareBridge's LTSS Specialists each of whom have a background in physical or occupational therapy complete a person-centered assessment of each individual informed by insights from the nation's largest HCBS analytical database to identify potential enhancements to the individual's care plan and recommend empowering alternatives that can keep the member safe and independent at home.
 
CareBridge's solutions have been shown to increase independence improve clinical quality and reduce emergency room visits hospitalizations and total costs all while receiving a Net Promoter Score of 84 from patients and families.
headline: Vice President at CareBridge

I love turning ideas into reality - from co-founding Runtastic / Tractive / Foxyfitness and scaling it to millions of users to supporting the next generation of founders and building tech that helps people move grow and feel great.

I'm a serial founder and investor based in Linz & Vienna Austria. In 2009 we co-founded Runtastic and I served as its CEO. We bootstrapped from zero to 250+ team members across 40+ countries reaching over 330 million users. Six years later adidas acquired Runtastic and I stayed for 3.5 years to learn how global scale and brand meet start-up speed.

In 2012 we started Tractive (100+ Mio € revenue) now the world leader in GPS tracking for dogs & cats. As Chief Growth Officer until 2020 I focused on building teams brand and international expansion.

Through 8eyes.io and my own investment company (Foxyflo) I've backed 40+ early-stage start-ups and several funds (468 Capital Holtzbrinck firstminute Capital & more). My goal: support founders who think big move fast and stay grounded.

I also believe in sharing what we learn - whether through my book "So läuft Start-up" my time on the Austrian Shark Tank show "2 Minuten 2 Millionen" my keynotes on technology entrepreneurship and mindset or my weekly Podcast "BTM - Business Technology & Millions".

In 2021 we launched Leaders21 a platform to build 21st-century skills and empower people to grow.

In 2023 I founded Foxyfitness - a company that merges AI gamification & fitness. Our first app the 100 Push-Ups Counter & Trainer automatically counts your reps and helps you get stronger every day. Meanwhile my former co-founders Christian and René joined and we're heading back into the App Business (2025).

 Beyond business:

I started Pearachute to solve a need I had personally which was that as a busy mom I wanted an easy way to spend more quality time with our children during these fleeting years. I wanted to feel more present with them during the time I had and I wanted to make sure we were doing things that connected us to friends and our community. 

Previously I co-founded GiveForward one of the world's first crowdfunding platforms. Over my seven years there we helped hundreds of thousands of families raise more than $190 million and at our peak had 1/10th of U.S. adults visiting our site annually. I learned so much through our multiple rounds of funding (Angel series A venture debt and strategic) and I am grateful for the opportunity to take those lessons to those I mentor and to my next adventure.

I am passionate about how technology can make the world a smaller and more connected place. I subscribe to the belief that every one of us can take small actions that change someone's world. As a believer in the Conscious Capitalism movement I'm deeply committed to maximizing stakeholder value and creating a workplace that elevates every team member. I'm an active mentor to other entrepreneurs and enjoy sharing the lessons we've learned along the way as a panelist or keynote speaker.

If there's a common thread to my career it's that I like to build solutions that help people feel less isolated and bring resources together to maximize outcomes. I'm currently bringing my passion for equity and inclusion to P33 where with the help of our corporate partners we'll help overlooked founders and funders get the support they need to launch and thrive.

I am the mother of two young boys Griffin and Aedan and stepmom to Danielle and proud wife to a retired Chicago Police Officer.

Call or text me here: https://popcall.com/desireechi

AgentOne – a desktop AI coding assistant that runs locally enabling developers to write format and automate code securely.

Privacy-first AI – secure local and on-premises deployment options.

company_description:
Truemed is redefining how Americans use their healthcare dollars. We partner with leading health and wellness brands — including Peloton Garmin Sleep Number and many more — to make their products eligible for HSA/FSA spending. The result: a simple affordable way for consumers to invest in tools that actually improve their health.

Most people think HSA/FSA funds can only be used for prescriptions or copays. But under IRS guidelines thousands of evidence-based products qualify when used for a medical purpose. Truemed bridges the gap by handling medical evaluations generating compliant documentation and integrating directly into merchant checkout flows so consumers can instantly use tax-free dollars on products designed to help them move sleep recover and perform better.

Whether it's connected fitness adaptive shoes recovery tech wearables or sleep optimization Truemed is building the infrastructure that connects proactive health products to the $150B+ in pre-tax healthcare spending.

Our mission is simple: empower people to spend healthcare dollars on things that actually make them healthier.
headline: CEO Truemed

about: Il y a toujours un moteur qui produit la force même enfoui même oublié il gronde tout au fond. Qu'il soit alimenté pas la peur la colère l'orgueil l'envie le besoin la revanche ou l'ego il doit produire chaque jour l'énergie nécessaire à l'action. La douleur aussi c'est un formidable moteur elle impose aussi de s'injecter chaque jour une dose d'action un antidouleur très efficace mais qui finit toujours tôt ou tard par ne plus faire d'effet. Ce jour de 1982 où j'ai décidé de me lancer dans l'aventure je n'avais aucun but. J'ai choisi un beau matin une route compliquée risquée un métier pour lequel je n'avais ni compétence ni formation ni probablement aucune des qualités nécessaires. Je n'avais pas d'autre but que ce chemin et l'inconscience et la prétention de croire que je serai capable de l'arpenter longtemps. Ce chemin m'a permis de rencontrer des gens extraordinaires. Il m'a permis de vivre des aventures incroyables de ne pas trop patauger dans l'eau pas nette et de ne jamais poser ma roue sur la moindre une ligne jaune. Il m'a donné la chance de vivre « une vie choisie » et il m'a enfin peut-être mené à moi même.

about:
Odin lets anyone anywhere launch and run a private investment firm online - think Shopify for Venture Capital and Private Equity. 

We handle the full stack end to end: legal structuring (SPVs and funds) investor onboarding KYC/AML payments tax reporting and exits. We administer over $500m in assets for over 200 emerging fund managers and deal by deal investors covering investments from pre-seed to pre-IPO. 

This includes household names like OpenAI and SpaceX but also new companies focusing on tons of cool things like:
- Next-gen micronuclear reactors
- Atmospheric CO₂ removal at gigaton scale
- Asteroid mining
- Space-based manufacturing (fiber alloys pharmaceuticals)
- Crazy biotech eg. wet computers based on human neurons

about:
Entrepreneur turned investor. Focussing on plant-based businesses. 

Started in tech founded 2dehands.be and 2ememain.be the market leading classified ads websites in Belgium (acquired by eBay in 2013). Founded several other successful companies including an Amsterdam based internet agency and a tech incubator.

After successfully growing and selling these companies I trained for and completed an Ironman. This enhanced my passion for plant based healthy living and the impact this has on the planet. Since this experience I have been following my passion and have become an experienced vegan investor.

As an early investor of The Vegetarian Butcher (acquired by Unilever in 2018) I experienced the massive growth of the plant based food space from up close. 

I’m investing in solely plantbased and biotech companies who focus on materials health and food. Companies that are transforming the world to one that is more sustainable by eliminating animals from the production system.

Now an executive producer of documentaries heading a rewilding project in Portugal and starting a foundation I’m committed to building a future free from animal exploitation—restoring biodiversity raising awareness and supporting sustainable change.

Ritual is a social ordering app that taps networks of co-workers and colleagues for fast and easy pick up and pay at a wide variety of local restaurants and coffee shops.

With Ritual users can mobile order and pay at all their favourite local eateries and coffee shops and have it ready to pick up when they arrive. By also uniquely giving friends and colleagues the ability to add their own food orders onto an existing order Ritual gives customers the choice of either picking up themselves or having their food brought right to their desk. This 'social ordering' saves customers time and drives incremental orders for merchants. The best and busiest quick service restaurants and coffee shops in major cities across North America and Australia are using Ritual to give them a competitive technological edge driving profitability and a more personalized way to connect with their customers.

 Second I practice Ubuntu. Not voodoo. Ubuntu is an African concept that means “I am because we are”. I enjoy creating opportunities for others whether helping people get on boards or helping CEOs build their businesses. My personal motto is to count assists not points scored. 

 Finally I’m WYSIWIG - what you see is what you get. When you are aligned from the inside out when you try to practice what you preach people listen. And that makes communication easy.

company_description:
Alpha is an independent AI governance intelligence and ratings firm setting the standard for continuous governance in the agent economy. We help boards management teams investors insurers and public institutions understand the quality of enterprise AI governance and act on it with decision-ready inputs for oversight capital allocation underwriting and risk management.

As AI becomes embedded across products operations and decision-making governance can no longer rely on static policies or periodic reviews. Alpha provides a continuously refreshed external view of governance quality through independent ratings benchmarks diagnostics and governance intelligence designed for enterprise-scale AI oversight.

We assess how organizations govern AI across strategy risk capital allocation controls disclosure and accountability. We do not certify individual models we evaluate whether an institution's governance environment is fit to deploy AI responsibly at scale and sustain oversight as AI systems and agents evolve.
